features.title: Psychological Stability Index (PSI)
features.description: A 0–100 score updated in real time across four zones: Stable (≥88), Caution (72–87), Warning (55–71), and Critical (<55) — so you can see when emotional pressure is building before it reaches a critical state.

features.title: Seven behavioral dimensions
features.description: Separate signals for revenge-style re-entry, stop manipulation, size outliers, hold-time collapse, holding deep losses, rule violations, and overtrading — each with its own weight you can tune.

features.title: Floating HUD + Dashboard
features.description: A lightweight overlay during trading plus a full Dashboard for session stats, timelines, history, profile baselines, and settings — all inside NinjaTrader 8.

features.title: Adaptive local baselines
features.description: Uses online statistics to adapt to your own trade timing and rhythm. Playback sessions do not pollute your live baseline.

features.title: Intel & Stats analytics workspace
features.description: A built-in analytics workspace: equity curve, win rate, profit factor, expectancy, PSI × P&L correlation, weekday and breakdown patterns, and per-account splits — so you can separate edge from luck on your own trades.

features.title: Built-in trade journal
features.description: A trade journal is included — your fills, notes, and review live alongside the live monitor and 5 years of local history, no separate journaling tool required.

features.title: Hard limits — physical size & order-type cap
features.description: Set a max-contracts ceiling and blocked entry order types while calm (Guard tier, off by default); Guard rejects over-cap or blocked-type entries at submission and trims a slipped market order back to the cap. Closing or reducing is never blocked. On both NinjaTrader 8 and the standalone apps.

features.title: No accounts, anonymous by design
features.description: Local-first by design: no login, no personal accounts, and Meridian never collects your name, broker credentials, account numbers, or funds. Your trades, baselines, journal, and 5-year session history stay on your machine.

features.title: Native in NT8 — standalone for Tradovate & Ironbeam
features.description: Ships as a native NinjaTrader 8 add-on using account and execution events — works in live and Market Replay. Standalone Windows apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts are in early access. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.

features.title: Alerts plus order-layer enforcement
features.description: Visual and optional voice alerts when PSI or dimensions cross the thresholds you configure — plus Guard's automated enforcement at the order layer: entry blocking, trading pauses, broker disconnect, optional auto-flatten, Hard limits, and the standalone Cool-down Wall and firewall-level Cut.
